title: 妮璐
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2025/7/17/531369.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1200/h_1920/50364/842288/2025/7/17/431452.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"妮璐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者妮璐，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"E.O.S.经济署的特派干员，直属于经济署署长欧里特利。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"早年在太平屿的一座边陲小镇长大，后加入梅因斯基金会，在梅因斯的举荐下，妮璐加入了E.O.S.经济署，并得到了梅因斯好友、时任经济署副署长的欧里特利的青睐随后，妮璐也成为了欧里特利的得力助手。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阳光外向、热情大方，精力充沛，想到什么就会去做，绝不会拖到第二天，好像体内有永远燃烧不完的能量，而且也很享受高行动力给自己带来的高成就感，是个典型的社交达人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"人缘极佳，在人群中总能主动发起倡议，且号召力极强常能一呼百应。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"工作里，她积极进取、责任心爆棚，所带小队在她的带领下，总能高质量完成任务。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她心怀弱者，总会主动施以援手，但帮助有度。因为她深知无节制的救助无法改变弱者命运，反而可能让资源最终流向剥削者。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她是所有人眼中的「小太阳」，也是队伍中绝佳靠谱的好伙伴。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"破序"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2025/7/17/30169.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"E.0.S.经济署"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"日影葵"}]}]}},{"key":"0.14f327b6b15db","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性别"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"女"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6eb19b12c8557","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"职业"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"E.O.S.经济署干员"}]}]}},{"key":"0.580b0d8414465","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"身份识别码"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"/"}]}]}},{"key":"0.13653ada819cf","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"ReA芯片状态"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"正常"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":130,"height":184},"imagesList":[],"imageList":[
